body.name: body
body.comment: candlestick body length (include both negative & positive values)

upwick.name: upper wick
upwick.comment: candlestick upper wick length = high - max(open, close)

lowwick.name: lower wick
lowwick.comment: candlestick lower wick length = min(open, close) - low

upwick_rate.name: upper wick rate
upwick_rate.comment: upper wick rate = upper wick / height

lowwick_rate.name: lower wick rate
lowwick_rate.comment: lower wick rate = lower wick / height

clv.name: Close Location Value
clv.comment: clv = 1 if High = Low else ((Close-Low) - (High-Close)) / (High - Low)

wick_imbalance.name: wick imbalance
wick_imbalance.comment: wick imbalance = upper wick - lower wick
